message:
fix: bd lint accepts non-empty acceptance_criteria field without heading (GH#2468)

Previously, bd lint required the literal text "Acceptance Criteria" (or
"Success Criteria" for epics) to appear inside the acceptance_criteria
field content. Now a non-empty field satisfies the requirement regardless
of whether a markdown heading is present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
